_comment: Drain runs with FULL desktop-equivalent access (2026-07-02, per Marshall: no sandbox/approval limits, all skills + brands + tools available) EXCEPT the outward hard lines, which deny rules enforce even in bypass mode: publishing (postiz CLI, Skill(post), publish-product), pushing code (git push, gh), and system/credential surfaces (launchctl, security, sudo). Drafts are staged for review in the Desk; shipping stays a separate approved step.
